**Prometheus restart complete.** ✓

Gateway booted and Telegram polling resumed. No source changes in this cycle — this was a clean restart from Telegram `/restart` command.

**Context from your last session:** You were troubleshooting token overhead and context re-injection behavior. The good news: your earlier fixes (Anthropic adapter pairing, hardened model-switch fail-open, and full intraday notes injection without truncation) are all still in place and verified.

**What do you want me to check or pick up on next?** Are you ready to dive back into the proposal executor task (step 2/4 on the windows-shell-playbook update), or do you want to run a quick verification first?
